nasb.text: When it was told to Jacob, “Behold, your son Joseph has come to you,” Israel collected his strength and sat up in the bed.

esv.text: And it was told to Jacob, “Your son Joseph has come to you.” Then Israel summoned his strength and sat up in bed.

cnv.text: 有人告訴雅各，說：“你的兒子約瑟到你這裡來了。”以色列就勉強在床上坐起來。

ccb.text: 雅各听说约瑟来了，就强撑着从床上坐起来，

csbs.text: 又有人告诉雅各说：“看哪，你的儿子约瑟到你这里来了！”以色列就竭尽全力，在床上坐起。
